name: playwright-recorder
description: Chrome extension recorder that saves browsing sessions as Playwright steps and replays them with Node.js.

scripts.build: cp shared/playwright-generator.js extension/playwright-generator.js && npx esbuild extension/src/background.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=extension/dist/background.js --platform=browser --external:../playwright --external:./bidiOverCdp
